prestazioni: 340ci (6.2L) LA-series V8 (engine code: A340) stroked to 408ci with a forged Eagle crankshaft (4.00" stroke), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and JE forged pistons (10.5:1 compression), paired with a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (280/288 duration, .580/.588 lift, 110 LSA) for aggressive mid-to-high RPM power delivery

Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 throttle body system with dual-plane Edelbrock Victor Jr. intake manifold, port-matched to the cylinder heads, and tuned via a FAST XFI Sportsman ECU with individual cylinder trimming for optimized air-fuel ratios under boost

Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) on a custom stainless steel header setup with Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate and Tial Q 50mm blow-off valve, feeding into a custom 3.5" intercooler piping system with a Garrett front-mount intercooler (700hp core) and dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps with Aeromotive fuel pressure regulator

Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission with a McLeod twin-disc RST clutch (10.5" diaphragm) and a Ford 9" rear end with Moser 31-spline axles, Detroit Locker differential, and 4.10:1 gearing for brutal acceleration off the line
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Plymouth-specific) with custom carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders to accommodate 10.5" front and 12" rear wheel widths, finished in a custom matte PPG Hemi Orange with gloss black accents

Forgeline GA3R 18x10.5" (front) and 18x12" (rear) three-piece wheels with brushed aluminum centers, wrapped in Nitto NT05R 275/35/18 (front) and 315/30/18 (rear) tires for maximum grip, paired with Baer 6P 14" front and 13" rear brake rotors with six-piston calipers

Custom roll cage by Chassisworks (8-point, mild steel) with integrated harness bar, painted in gloss black, and a custom aluminum dash by Dakota Digital with a retro-modern gauge cluster (VDO 3.5" tachometer, Speedhut boost gauge, and AEM wideband AFR display)
